add_key.summary: Identify exact dashboard/access-start hardware and software, confirm current tool support, back up security data where supported, prepare the dealer key and perform Add Key adaptation.
add_key.warning: Support varies by dashboard generation and model year.

autel_apb300.summary: Official Autel APB300 working-key Add Key coverage lists Volkswagen T-Cross 2018-2021.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Open and read the original working key using APB300

tool_accessory_ids: Supported Autel VW/Audi-style IKEY or key PCB
warnings: Coverage is Add Key only and does not establish All Keys Lost support.
Confirm the exact key PCB and keyed or KESSY configuration before programming.
Autel states no additional adapter is needed for the APB300 working-key data route.

all_keys_lost.summary: Confirm explicit AKL coverage for the fitted protected MQB system before work; use only the supported security-data and dealer-key preparation route.
all_keys_lost.warning: Do not assume standard MQB48 coverage applies to every T-Cross.
